lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਪਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis no kripaa karai tis aapan naam dee |
lines.english: He Himself gives His Name to those, upon whom He bestows His Mercy.
Very fortunate, O Nanak, are those people. ||8||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਹੁ ਸਿਆਨਪ ਸੁਰਿ ਜਨਹੁ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tajahu siaanap sur janahu simarahu har har raae |
lines.english: Give up your cleverness, good people - remember the Lord God, your King!

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਆਸ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਰਖਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੂਖੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ek aas har man rakhahu naanak dookh bharam bhau jaae |1|
lines.english: Enshrine in your heart, your hopes in the One Lord. O Nanak, your pain, doubt and fear shall depart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨੁਖ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ਬ੍ਰਿਥੀ ਸਭ ਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: maanukh kee ttek brithee sabh jaan |
lines.english: Reliance on mortals is in vain - know this well.
The Great Giver is the One Lord God.
By His gifts, we are satisfied,
Ashtapadee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਬੂਝਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa hukam boojh sukh hoe |
lines.english: Understanding His Order, there is peace.
The One Lord Himself destroys and also preserves.
and we suffer from thirst no longer.
Nothing at all is in the hands of mortal beings.
Remember, remember, remember God in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਖੁ ਕੰਠਿ ਪਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis kaa naam rakh kantth paroe |
lines.english: So take His Name, and wear it as your necklace.
O Nanak, no obstacle shall stand in your way. ||1||
Let your tongue become pure, drinking in the Ambrosial Nectar.
Praise the Formless Lord in your mind.
O my mind, make this your true occupation.
With your eyes, see the wondrous play of your Lord and Master.
Your soul shall be forever peaceful.
In the Company of the Holy, all other associations vanish.
With your feet, walk in the Way of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਮ ਸ੍ਰਵਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: kar har karam sravan har kathaa |
lines.english: So do the Lord's Work, and listen to the Lord's Sermon.
In the Lord's Court, O Nanak, your face shall be radiant. ||2||
Sins are washed away, chanting the Lord's Name, even for a moment.
Those who dwell upon the Lord's Name,
Very fortunate are those humble beings in this world,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa har ke gun gaeh |
lines.english: who sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, forever and ever.
know that they are peaceful and happy, forever and ever.
are the most wealthy and prosperous in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੁਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: man tan mukh boleh har mukhee |
lines.english: Those who speak of the Supreme Lord in thought, word and deed

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam sang jis kaa man maaniaa |
lines.english: One whose mind accepts the Company of the Naam,
One who recognizes the One and only Lord as One,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤ ਉਤ ਕੀ ਓਹੁ ਸੋਝੀ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: eit ut kee ohu sojhee jaanai |
lines.english: understands this world and the next.
the Name of the Lord, O Nanak, knows the Immaculate Lord. ||3||
know that then, his thirst is quenched.
In the Company of the Holy, one chants the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har.
By Guru's Grace, one understands himself;
In the midst of your household, remain balanced and unattached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਰੋਗ ਤੇ ਓਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ਰਹਤ ॥
lines.translit: sarab rog te ohu har jan rehat |
lines.english: Such a devotee of the Lord is free of all disease.
Night and day, sing the Kirtan, the Praises of the One Lord.
One whose mind hungers for the Supreme Lord God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਊਪਰਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: ek aoopar jis jan kee aasaa |
lines.english: One who places his hopes in the One Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕਟੀਐ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis kee katteeai jam kee faasaa |
lines.english: the noose of Death is cut away from his neck.
O Nanak, shall not suffer pain. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਨਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis kau har prabh man chit aavai |
lines.english: One who focuses his conscious mind on the Lord God
- that Saint is at peace; he does not waver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਸ ਤੇ ਡਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: so sevak kahu kis te ddarai |
lines.english: who do those servants need to fear?
Those unto whom God has granted His Grace
As God is, so does He appear;
Searching, searching, searching, and finally, success!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਬ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮੂਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: jab dekhau tab sabh kichh mool |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I see Him, at the root of all things.
in His Own creation, He Himself is pervading.
By Guru's Grace, the essence of all reality is understood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਨਮੈ ਨਹ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: neh kichh janamai neh kichh marai |
lines.english: Nothing is born, and nothing dies.
O Nanak, He is the subtle, and He is also the manifest. ||5||
He Himself stages His own drama.
all the world is obedient to His Will.
Coming and going, seen and unseen,
